channel.title: The Git Times
channel.description: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

item.title: OfficeCLI Lets AI Agents Read, Edit, and Automate Office Files Without Installing Office
item.description: “We are what we behold. We shape our tools and then our tools shape us.” — John Culkin

item.title: A Browser-Based Bird Flock Simulator Soothes Digital Fatigue
item.description: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

item.title: Claude Plugin Reshapes Academic Research With Disciplined Human Oversight
item.description: “The best way to predict the future is to invent it.” — Alan Kay

item.title: Graphify Turns Codebases Into Queryable Knowledge Graphs for AI
item.description: “We are called to be architects of the future, not its victims.” — Buckminster Fuller

item.title: CodeGraph Supercharges Claude Code with Local Knowledge Graphs
item.description: “You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.” — Buckminster Fuller

item.title: External ImGui Overlay Enhances GTA V Without Code Injection
item.description: “Progress imposes not only new possibilities for the future but new restrictions.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: Multica v0.3.1 Elevates AI Agents as True Development Teammates
item.description: “The best material model of a cat is another, or preferably the same, cat.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: Awesome Go List Evolves to Meet AI and Cloud Demands
item.description: “The major problems of the world are the result of the difference between how nature works and the way people think.” — Gregory Bateson

item.title: Symphony Frees Teams From Supervising AI Coding Agents
item.description: “The best way to predict the future is to invent it.” — Alan Kay

item.title: Veteran Engineer Releases Skills to Elevate AI Beyond Vibe Coding
item.description: “We are called to be architects of the future, not its victims.” — Buckminster Fuller

item.title: Stash Adds Persistent Memory to AI Agents
item.description: “You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.” — Buckminster Fuller

item.title: Proxy Unlocks Free Claude Code for Terminal and VSCode Users
item.description: “Progress imposes not only new possibilities for the future but new restrictions.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: WorldMonitor's v2.5.23 Release Transforms Time-Sensitive Global Oversight
item.description: “The best material model of a cat is another, or preferably the same, cat.” — Norbert Wiener

item.title: Perry v0.5.178 Stabilizes Native TypeScript Pipeline
item.description: “The major problems of the world are the result of the difference between how nature works and the way people think.” — Gregory Bateson

item.title: Native C++ Finance Terminal Brings Bloomberg Power to Developers
item.description: “The purpose of a system is what it does.” — Stafford Beer

item.title: Kami Imposes Editorial Discipline on AI Documents
item.description: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

item.title: OpenMythos Reconstructs Claude Mythos Architecture
item.description: “Tools for conviviality are those which give each person who uses them the greatest opportunity to enrich the environment with the fruits of their vision.” — Ivan Illich

item.title: Evolver Engine Brings Genetic Protocols to AI Self-Evolution
item.description: “Everywhere we remain unfree and chained to technology, whether we passionately affirm or deny it.” — Martin Heidegger

item.title: Oh-My-ClaudeCode v4.12 Adds Per-Role Model Routing for Teams
item.description: “Whether a technology is liberating or enslaving depends on who controls it.” — Ursula Franklin

item.title: Antigravity Skills Add Gift Workflow and Test Automation
item.description: “The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.” — B.F. Skinner
